description: Instanceof chain for expression compilation logic
reasoning: Switch Statement on type smell -> OCP violation because the buildCondition method uses an explicit instanceof chain to determine how to compile different BooleanExpression subtypes. Adding a new expression type requires modifying this central compiler class, violating the principle that the class should be closed for modification.

description: Hardcoded case statement for configuration validators
reasoning: Switch Statement on type smell -> OCP violation because the validate_value method contains a large, hardcoded case statement that handles all configuration validation logic. Adding a new validator type requires modifying this core mixin. This should be refactored to use a registry of validator objects that can be extended without modifying existing code.

description: Case statement checking specific PipelineAction classes
reasoning: Switch Statement on type smell -> OCP violation because dispatch_events uses a case statement to check for specific PipelineAction subclasses like Create, Reload, and Stop. Adding a new action type requires modifying the agent's event dispatching logic.
